title: Fix Picklist Mapping Only Displaying One Source Record
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want all source object records to persist after picklist mapping, so that I don't lose data when navigating between mapping views.
description: After linking a field and navigating to the picklist mapping view, pasting a list of industry values and then navigating back left only one source object record visible instead of the full list. The multi-insert logic was corrupting the source object listing.
acceptance_criteria: All source records persist after picklist mapping operations
Navigating between mapping views does not delete records
ux_changes: Source object records persist correctly when navigating between field and picklist mapping views.
middleware_changes: Fixed multi-insert logic to not corrupt source object listing.
comment_summary: Waqar fixed the issue and deployed to production. Ryan provided a screencast to reproduce.
